sprite.proportionPolicy: uniform_scale_preserve_input_character_proportions
sprite.inputReferenceInvariant: static front standing pose is the not-moving player state; preserve character size, proportions, feet position, and center anchor across all 16 frames
sprite.adaptiveFramePolicy: same 608x1055 animation frame as other Wei Yang clips; do not clamp to per-frame content bbox

motionAmplitude.estimatedMaxPixelChange: about 1-2 px; alpha foot bottom remains locked to the same pixel row

binding.notes: Click/select the character to preview; A/D switch to left/right walk clips, keyup returns to idle breathing.

sprite.description: 8-frame left walk cycle mirrored from the head-locked right walk.
sprite.style: HD anime side-scroller walk spritesheet, head scale locked, transparent PNG, fixed rectangular frames
sprite.prompt: Head-size stabilized Wei Yang walk left; fixed frame box; stable bottom anchor; no per-frame crop.

sprite.proportionPolicy: preserve frame size and body scale; normalize head width across frames
sprite.inputReferenceInvariant: keep character size and ground anchor stable; remove visible head-size breathing/scale drift in walk frames
sprite.adaptiveFramePolicy: do not clamp to content bbox; all clips share 608x1055 frame

binding.notes: Press A: mirrored one-cycle small stride walk; head width is normalized across frames.

sprite.description: 8-frame right walk cycle with head width normalized across frames.
sprite.style: HD anime side-scroller walk spritesheet, head scale locked, transparent PNG, fixed rectangular frames
sprite.prompt: Head-size stabilized Wei Yang walk right; fixed frame box; stable bottom anchor; no per-frame crop.
